head.hi: The Acting Secretary of State to the Diplomatic Representatives in All Latin American Countries

div.p: At the instance of Secretary of Treasury inform Government to which you are accredited that expenses of delegates sent to the Second Pan-American Financial Conference to be held at Washington January 12 and 17, 1920, will be defrayed by this Government during the period of their stay in Washington for the purposes of the Conference. It is requested that delegates shall reach Washington not later than the evening of January 9, 1920.
